ideation: This animation sequence portrays the robot mimicking the hands on a clock showing seven o'clock.  The robot's right arm will represent the hour hand, and the left arm will represent the minute hand.  The movement will be a slow, deliberate shift to emphasize the time-telling aspect. The sequence will start with the arms positioned to show approximately seven o'clock, then move through intermediate positions to a final pose that clearly depicts seven o'clock.  The arms will move from an approximate position to a precise position, allowing for expressive, natural movements. This should convey the feeling of a clock ticking and showing the time.

frames.beat: arms rest, left minute hand high, right hour hand points to seven
the clock hands tick forward slightly
the arms settle, clearly showing seven o'clock
